title: Roche India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Roche India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
